title: Harry Potter 'Muggles' Single Duvet Set – Reversible Two Sided Hogwarts Large Print Design
features: Every budding witch and wizard will want this Hogwarts inspired bedding from Character World. The reversible duvet set has two unique designs both incorporating the famous wizarding schools logo.
The funky designs are perfect for Harry Potter fans of all ages and will be sure to bring magic to any bedroom.
Officially licensed design made from 50% cotton & 50% polyester.
Includes a duvet cover and matching pillowcase, machine washable and tumble dryer safe.
Size - Duvet Size: 135cm x 200cm, Pillow Case size: 48cm x 74cm
description: Product Description We know how important a good night’s sleep is to a child and that their bedroom is the one place that they can truly express themselves. The best loved characters become part of a child’s world and they want their new friend to share everything with them. We understand that at character world and that’s why we create exciting products that transform every child’s bedroom into a room for imagination. Box Contains 1 DUVET
